ItacPersonItem.Notes: Portraits from Giambattista Della Porta, Della Fisionomia dell’Huomo, 1623; Lorenzo Crasso, Elogij, Venice, 1666. Portrait as Linceo in De distillatione (1608). Became member of the Lincei in 1610, and president of the Neapolitan Lincei in 1614.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
